title: The Seducing Woods Trap
description: On pages 23–23, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Big Mom as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: The group is pulled into Whole Cake Island’s strange living landscape, where the forest itself becomes an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hey, what the hell is this?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said something about your hands being the most precious to you... well then, perfect.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you familiar with the collars that world nobles put on their slaves?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A handy tool that allows them to blow up any- one who tries to run away from their owner.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those wrists are no different. If you try to leave this island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, let's just say you'll be cooking with your feet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom was kind enough to lend us a pair...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and only she possesses the keys to all of those devices.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, that isn't to say that Germa would ever let you leave this place alive in the first place... because we surely wouldn't.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whether you like it or not... I'll definitely have you proceed with the marriage!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Sami is knee deep in it now!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 11 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
